validation.command: cd 'O:/AII/上下文助手/' && python -c "from scripts.requirement_optimizer import get_full_input; import tempfile, json, os; from core.db import StateDB; d=tempfile.mkdtemp(); db=StateDB(d); db.init_task('TEST'); db.set_user_input('TEST', json.dumps({'chunks': [{'seq':0,'content':'hello'},{'seq':1,'content':'world'}]}, ensure_ascii=False)); result=get_full_input(d); assert 'hello' in result and 'world' in result, f'Data contract broken: {result}'; print('B1 VALIDATION PASS')"
cd 'O:/AII/上下文助手/' && for f in .claude/agents/*.md; do if grep -q 'state_machine' "$f" 2>/dev/null; then echo "FAIL: $f still references state_machine"; exit 1; fi; done && echo 'B2 VALIDATION PASS'
cd 'O:/AII/上下文助手/' && test -f .claude/agents/input_collector.md && grep -q 'transition_state' .claude/agents/input_collector.md && echo 'B3 VALIDATION PASS'

cd 'O:/AII/上下文助手/' && python -c "from core.db import StateDB; import tempfile; d=tempfile.mkdtemp(); db=StateDB(d); db.init_task('T1'); r=db.update_status('T1','requirement_optimizing'); r2=db.get_state('T1'); assert 'next_agent' not in r2, f'next_agent leaked into DB: {r2.keys()}'; print('B5 VALIDATION PASS')"
